## [00:00 - 01:28]

And so I'm so excited that you're going to meet Greg Christian. He is an amazing father, amazing husband. He's been a dear friend. He's an incredible attorney and just in a short little training, I think it could take away any questions on what the next best steps are to get an LLC as you grow this business. How to protect yourself if it's a different bank account and how to make sure that you make this a real business as you grow this into something amazing. Without further ado, give it up for Greg.
